title: FEMA Go-Bag (Evacuation Kit)
immediate_steps: Pack 1 gallon of water per person per day (3-day supply)
Pack a 3-day supply of non-perishable food
Include a battery-powered or hand-crank radio (NOAA Weather Radio)
Include a flashlight with extra batteries
Pack a First Aid kit, whistle, dust mask, moist towelettes, and garbage bags
Include local maps, a manual can opener, and a cell phone with backup chargers
Store copies of important documents in a waterproof container
avoid: Do not pack heavy canned goods if you are traveling on foot
Do not forget medications and pet supplies
Do not leave the kit in an inaccessible place
